name: Chrono
previous_description: Active - Creates a 10sec force field that blocks 1000 damage. 60s Cooldown
updated_description: Active - Creates an impenetrable force field that blocks 1000 DMG. Unable to attack outside enemies from within the field. All effects last for 10s. Cooldown: 45s.

changes.note: More frequent force-field availability in CS entries, retakes, and resets.

changes.after: Cannot attack outside enemies from inside the field
changes.note: Shown as a note so the cooldown buff is not over-read.

clash_squad_note: Strongest impact is round tempo: Chrono can contest more buy-rounds and late-round retakes because the cooldown is shorter.

name: Maro
previous_description:
Passive - Dmg increases with distance up to 25%
 
 Dmg to marked enemies increases by 5%
updated_description: Passive - Damage increases with distance, up to 20%. Damage to marked enemies increases by 5%.
clash_squad_note: Less threatening on long lanes; still rewards marks and clean distance fights, but the ceiling is lower.

name: Nero
previous_description: Active - Throws a 150-HP plushie. The plushie lasts for 12s, ignores any obstacles and can fly up to 50m (100m in BR). The plushie will track the nearest enemy in sight within 8m range and explode to create an 8m-radius dreamy space. Inside the space, the user and their enemies cannot place Gloo Walls. Their enemies also lose 10 HP/s (prev 14HP/s). The space disappears once the plushie is destroyed. The destroyer will be marked for 5s. Cooldown: 45s.
updated_description: Active - Throws a 1-HP plushie. The plushie lasts for 12s, ignores obstacles and can fly up to 50m (100m in BR). The plushie tracks the nearest enemy in sight within 8m and explodes to create an 8m dreamy space. Inside the space, the user and enemies cannot place Gloo Walls. Enemies lose 6 HP/s. The space disappears once the plushie is destroyed. The destroyer is marked for 5s. Cooldown: 45s.

changes.note: Much easier to shoot and remove before the zone controls the fight.
Lower drain pressure inside the dreamy space.

clash_squad_note: Still useful for anti-Gloo control, but CS teams can now counter it faster by clearing the plushie immediately.

name: Nikita
previous_description: Passive - Reload speed increases by 20% (prev 30%). Every time the skill user hits an enemy, said target will get a 50% healing deduction that lasts for 6s (max. deduction: 50%).
updated_description: Passive - Reload speed increases by 20%. Every time the skill user hits an enemy, the target receives a 50% healing deduction for 6s. Max deduction: 50%.

changes.note: Lower weapon-handling advantage during repeated duels.

clash_squad_note: Anti-heal remains valuable versus sustain comps, but the direct reload tempo is weaker.

name: Olivia
previous_description:
Passive - Increase healing effects by 30% and spread 80% of the user's single-target healing
 
 amount to teammates within 15m
updated_description: Passive - Increases healing effects by 30% and spreads 90% of the user's single-target healing amount to teammates within 20m.

changes.note: More healing value reaches nearby teammates.
Easier to cover grouped teammates in reset fights.

clash_squad_note: Better for grouped CS reset rounds, especially when the team plays close enough to benefit from healing spread.

name: Oscar
previous_description: Active - Dashes towards the target direction, detonating the first 3 Gloo Walls in the way with 25 DMG, while also dealing 25 DMG to and knocking back enemies encountered. Cooldown: 45s
updated_description: Active - Dashes toward the target direction, detonating the first 3 Gloo Walls in the way with 25 DMG, while also dealing 25 DMG to and knocking back enemies encountered. Cooldown: 60s.

changes.note: Missed entry timing is more punishable.

clash_squad_note: Still a premium Gloo-breaking entry tool, but teams must be more careful with when they commit the dash.
